name: spotify-now-playing
title: Spotify Now Playing
description: A live 'now playing / last played' footer line powered by the Spotify Web API, with a hover preview and a centered glassmorphism modal. Pulses green while playing; static grey otherwise.

files.content:
export { NowPlaying } from "./now-playing"
export { NowPlayingWidget } from "./now-playing-widget"
export { PROVIDERS, buildEmbedUrl } from "./providers"
export type { NowPlayingResult, Provider, Track } from "./types"

@utility animate-text-shimmer.background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--shimmer-base) 0%, var(--shimmer-base) 25%, var(--shimmer-glint) 50%, var(--shimmer-base) 75%, var(--shimmer-base) 100%)
